description: A content entry — title, metadata, and a markdown body. Derived from the real frontmatter across posts / open-source / recipes / art / melange in obsidian_cms: every collection currently shares this exact shape.

slug.description: URL slug; also the record's rkey. Form: <timestamp>-<words>, e.g. 1546329600000-markdown-test.

published.description: Whether the entry is live. Drafts are published: false.

created.description: Authored timestamp. Source frontmatter uses 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM'; normalized to RFC3339 UTC on push.

excerpt.description: Short summary. Optional — absent on a few entries.

body.description: Markdown source. Images are inline `![](ipfs://<cid>)` URIs.
